title: CT4 static tactic graph — Charging schemes
description: Concrete static-graph schema for CT4 (Charging schemes). It requires the complete 17-node array in fixed source order from CT4.N01 through CT4.N17, with exact node IDs, ordinals, and roles; all remaining graph data must satisfy the generic tactic specification.

tacticId.description: Required discriminator for the CT4 (Charging schemes) tactic specification; must equal "CT4".

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT4.N01, "Definition — demand set D and scarce payer set P", in CT4 (Charging schemes); must equal "CT4.N01".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT4.N01, "Definition — demand set D and scarce payer set P"; must equal the integer 1.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT4.N01, "Definition — demand set D and scarce payer set P"; must equal "decision", meaning this node requires an exhaustive and justified branch split.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT4.N02, "Scope candidate — no admissible local demand family — scope audit", in CT4 (Charging schemes); must equal "CT4.N02".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT4.N02, "Scope candidate — no admissible local demand family — scope audit"; must equal the integer 2.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT4.N02, "Scope candidate — no admissible local demand family — scope audit"; must equal "scope_audit", meaning this node records a candidate scope obstruction for audit, not as a proved fact.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT4.N03, "Definition — canonical assignment rule pi:D", in CT4 (Charging schemes); must equal "CT4.N03".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT4.N03, "Definition — canonical assignment rule pi:D"; must equal the integer 3.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT4.N03, "Definition — canonical assignment rule pi:D"; must equal "decision", meaning this node requires an exhaustive and justified branch split.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT4.N04, "Payload record — P_4→13: no available payer", in CT4 (Charging schemes); must equal "CT4.N04".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT4.N04, "Payload record — P_4→13: no available payer"; must equal the integer 4.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT4.N04, "Payload record — P_4→13: no available payer"; must equal "residual_record", meaning this node records typed data that survives the branch.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT4.N05, "Payload lemma — P_4→13 satisfies CT13 trigger", in CT4 (Charging schemes); must equal "CT4.N05".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT4.N05, "Payload lemma — P_4→13 satisfies CT13 trigger"; must equal the integer 5.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT4.N05, "Payload lemma — P_4→13 satisfies CT13 trigger"; must equal "payload_constructor", meaning this node constructs a typed payload satisfying a consumer trigger.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT4.N06, "CT 13 — tiered charging", in CT4 (Charging schemes); must equal "CT4.N06".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT4.N06, "CT 13 — tiered charging"; must equal the integer 6.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT4.N06, "CT 13 — tiered charging"; must equal "consumer_handoff", meaning this node hands a declared typed payload to another tactic.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT4.N07, "Lemma — pi is total, deterministic, and branch-state measurable?", in CT4 (Charging schemes); must equal "CT4.N07".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT4.N07, "Lemma — pi is total, deterministic, and branch-state measurable?"; must equal the integer 7.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT4.N07, "Lemma — pi is total, deterministic, and branch-state measurable?"; must equal "assertion", meaning this node states a claim that must be proved from the recorded state.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT4.N08, "Dichotomy lemma — are all fibres C-bounded?", in CT4 (Charging schemes); must equal "CT4.N08".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT4.N08, "Dichotomy lemma — are all fibres C-bounded?"; must equal the integer 8.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT4.N08, "Dichotomy lemma — are all fibres C-bounded?"; must equal "decision", meaning this node requires an exhaustive and justified branch split.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT4.N09, "Payload lemma — build P_4→9 — overcharged fibre", in CT4 (Charging schemes); must equal "CT4.N09".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT4.N09, "Payload lemma — build P_4→9 — overcharged fibre"; must equal the integer 9.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT4.N09, "Payload lemma — build P_4→9 — overcharged fibre"; must equal "payload_constructor", meaning this node constructs a typed payload satisfying a consumer trigger.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT4.N10, "CT 9 — overload", in CT4 (Charging schemes); must equal "CT4.N10".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT4.N10, "CT 9 — overload"; must equal the integer 10.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT4.N10, "CT 9 — overload"; must equal "consumer_handoff", meaning this node hands a declared typed payload to another tactic.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT4.N11, "Lemma — capacity inequality — |D|≤ C|P|+o(n)", in CT4 (Charging schemes); must equal "CT4.N11".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT4.N11, "Lemma — capacity inequality — |D|≤ C|P|+o(n)"; must equal the integer 11.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT4.N11, "Lemma — capacity inequality — |D|≤ C|P|+o(n)"; must equal "assertion", meaning this node states a claim that must be proved from the recorded state.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT4.N12, "Lemma — demand lower bound — |D|≥ cn-o(n)", in CT4 (Charging schemes); must equal "CT4.N12".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT4.N12, "Lemma — demand lower bound — |D|≥ cn-o(n)"; must equal the integer 12.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT4.N12, "Lemma — demand lower bound — |D|≥ cn-o(n)"; must equal "assertion", meaning this node states a claim that must be proved from the recorded state.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT4.N13, "Comparison theorem — does demand exceed capacity?", in CT4 (Charging schemes); must equal "CT4.N13".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT4.N13, "Comparison theorem — does demand exceed capacity?"; must equal the integer 13.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT4.N13, "Comparison theorem — does demand exceed capacity?"; must equal "comparison", meaning this node compares certified quantities and routes every outcome.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT4.N14, "C4 — charging contradiction", in CT4 (Charging schemes); must equal "CT4.N14".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT4.N14, "C4 — charging contradiction"; must equal the integer 14.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT4.N14, "C4 — charging contradiction"; must equal "certificate", meaning this node is a terminal closure or contradiction certificate.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT4.N15, "Branch-state record — capacity bound remains compatible", in CT4 (Charging schemes); must equal "CT4.N15".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT4.N15, "Branch-state record — capacity bound remains compatible"; must equal the integer 15.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT4.N15, "Branch-state record — capacity bound remains compatible"; must equal "definition", meaning this node defines an exact object, predicate, or invariant used later.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT4.N16, "Payload lemma — build P_4→14 — aggregate mass residual", in CT4 (Charging schemes); must equal "CT4.N16".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT4.N16, "Payload lemma — build P_4→14 — aggregate mass residual"; must equal the integer 16.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT4.N16, "Payload lemma — build P_4→14 — aggregate mass residual"; must equal "payload_constructor", meaning this node constructs a typed payload satisfying a consumer trigger.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT4.N17, "CT 14 — aggregate closure", in CT4 (Charging schemes); must equal "CT4.N17".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT4.N17, "CT 14 — aggregate closure"; must equal the integer 17.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT4.N17, "CT 14 — aggregate closure"; must equal "consumer_handoff", meaning this node hands a declared typed payload to another tactic.

nodes.description: Required complete node specification for CT4 (Charging schemes); must contain exactly 17 generic node objects in source order from CT4.N01 through CT4.N17, with the fixed identity, ordinal, and role declared at each position.
